import React from 'react'; import styles from '../../css/dashboard.module.css'; // Припускаємо, що це ваш CSS Module const DashboardContent = () => { return (
{/* 1. JSX: className, закритий тег */}
{/* 1. JSX: className, закриті теги */}
{/* To-Do Block */}
{/* 2. Виправлення недійсних тегів: та */}
{/* Task 1 (Not Started) */}
{renderCircle(styles.red_circle)}

Attend Nischal’s Birthday Party

{/* Task 2 (In Progress) */}
{renderCircle(styles.blue_circle)}

Landing Page Design for TravelDays

{/* Task 3 (In Progress) */}
{renderCircle(styles.blue_circle)}

Presentation on Final Product

{/* Task Status Block */}
{/* Chart 1 */} {renderChartProgress(84, 'green', '84%')}
Completed
{/* Chart 2 */} {renderChartProgress(46, 'blue', '46%')}
In Progress
{/* Chart 3 */} {renderChartProgress(13, 'red', '13%')}
Not Started
{renderCircle(styles.green_circle)}

Walk the dog

{renderCircle(styles.green_circle)}

Conduct meeting

); }; export default DashboardContent;
